sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61440" key="laba/rguros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰβάργῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61440.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking money</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὡρολογητής</foreign> Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
